prompt: Read the spec at /workspace/.claude/skills/bootstrap/evals/files/spec-parallelizable.md. Don't interview me — the spec is already complete. Just add the Work Units section to the end of it. Write the result to the outputs directory.
assertions: Output contains a '## Work Units' section
Execution strategy is NOT 'Sequential' — the 3 scrapers are independent
The 3 scraper scripts are assigned to separate parallel units
No two parallel units share the same file
requirements.txt is in the foundation unit, not a parallel unit
Runtime dependencies section exists and addresses the notebook's dependency on the scrapers' CSV output
A post-merge verification section exists with an E2E test recipe
